title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: What are the advantages of living in different environments?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two environments offer the greatest advantages for overall quality of life.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about the advantages of living in different environments.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two environments offer the greatest advantages.
